rulings.Case Title: ROBERT RUHL et al VS. AMCHEM PRODUCTS INC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder In Defts Union Carbide Corp. And Bayer Cropscience, Inc., As Successor To Amchem Products, Inc.'S Ntc Of Mo To Compel Pltfs To Serve The Appropriate Signed Form To Allow Defts To Obtain Military Records
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Wednesday, February 10, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 3. DEFENDANT KAISER GYPSUM COMPANY, INC.'s Joinder In Defendants Union Carbide Corp. And Bayer Cropscience, Inc., As Successor To Amchem Products, Inc.'s motion To Compel Plaintiffs To Serve The Appropriate Signed Form To Allow Defts To Obtain Military Records is granted. Within 5 days plaintiffs are to serve form 13055 signed by Mr. Ruhl to designated Berry and Berry. = (220/HEK)
